arts.ttl: Romelu Lukaku stops Victor Osimhen joining Man Utd
arts.sum: Romelu Lukaku ’s brutal form for Chelsea was a key reason why Manchester United opted against moving for Victor Osimhen this summer. Signing Osimhen, who wanted to move to the Premier League and had enjoyed a prolific spell at Napoli and led them to a historic Scudetto in 2023, seemed like a no-brainer for United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd issue update on highly-rated wonderkid who played first game for nine months
arts.sum: Attacking midfielder Dan Gore returned to action for Manchester United's U-21 team on Tuesday night after recovering from freak shoulder injury sustained in January

arts.ttl: Man Utd preparing for new contract talks with Mainoo and Diallo
arts.sum: Manchester United are preparing to discuss new contracts for key duo Kobbie Mainoo and Amad Diallo, Sky Sports News can reveal.

arts.ttl: Ranking the favourites to win the Europa League as Man Utd and Spurs eye glory
arts.sum: The Uefa Europa League has returned for another season, and this time both Man Utd and Spurs are among the favourites to lift the trophy. The competition is bigger than ever in 2024/25, with an extra four clubs taking the total amount of teams to 36. Each participant will play eight games – four home […] The post Ranking the favourites to win the Europa League as Man Utd and Spurs eye glory first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup ball numbers as Man Utd, Chelsea and rivals prepare to learn opponents
arts.sum: The fourth round of the Carabao Cup will take place at the end of October, with 16 teams - including some Premier League big-hitters - set to learn their opponents.

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup 4th round draw live Manchester United and Man City ball numbers and start time
arts.sum: The draw for the fourth round of the Carabao Cup will be conducted on Wednesday evening as Man United and Manchester City await their opponents.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes a 'big problem' for Man Utd
arts.sum: Bruno has missed big chances against the likes of Fulham and Crystal Palace and the latter game in particular has caused some consternation at Man Utd . Bruno Fernandes is currently the worst finisher in Europe's top-five leagues - and this is a big problem for Manchester United .
